CREATE TABLE more_data (id INT, value DOUBLE);
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered;
CREATE TABLE extra_data (group_id INT, value DOUBLE);
SELECT group_id, sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM extra_data GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM test_data WHERE value BETWEEN 2.0 AND 4.0;
CREATE TABLE joins_data (id INT, value DOUBLE);
SELECT j.id, sys.stddev_pop(j.value) FROM joins_data j JOIN more_data m ON j.id = m.id GROUP BY j.id;
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS temp WHERE temp.value >= 3.0;
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM extra_data WHERE group_id = 1) AS grp1;
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data) AS all_values;
SELECT sys.stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS unique_values;
